headline: China threatens 'strong countermeasures' over imminent Pelosi Taiwan visit; chip stocks and TAIEX slide on Taiwan-Strait conflict fears
US tightens China chip export controls, banning Nvidia A800/H800 and more AI/WFE exports to close 2022-rule loopholes
BYD overtakes Tesla as the world's top EV seller in Q4
NVIDIA posts record datacenter revenue as AI demand surges; shares jump
NVIDIA launches the Blackwell GPU platform at GTC 2024
Tesla Q1 deliveries fall well short of estimates
Magnitude 7.4 earthquake hits Taiwan; TSMC halts production at multiple fabs
Apple unveils Apple Intelligence at WWDC; shares hit record high
Samsung Electronics union stages first-ever strike
TSMC posts record profit on AI chip demand and raises outlook
Intel plunges on weak guidance, dividend suspension and layoffs
US judge rules Google illegally monopolized online search
Report: NVIDIA's Blackwell AI GPUs delayed by a design flaw
Global risk-off as yen carry trade unwinds after BoJ hike and weak US jobs; Nikkei plunges ~12%, Nasdaq sells off hard
Apple slides as analysts flag weak early iPhone 16 demand with Apple Intelligence absent at launch
US DOJ sues Visa over alleged debit-network monopoly
PBOC unveils sweeping monetary stimulus (rate and RRR cuts, property and equity support); Chinese equities and US-listed China names rally
Micron jumps on AI-driven memory demand and upbeat guidance
ASML shares plunge after orders miss and outlook cut (early release)
SK hynix posts record Q3 profit on explosive HBM/AI-memory demand; shares jump to a record
Super Micro plunges after auditor Ernst & Young resigns citing inability to rely on management representations
Trump wins 2024 US election; stocks rally on tax/deregulation hopes while tariff and China-trade-war fears hit China-exposed names
US tightens export controls on advanced chips and equipment to China
Marvell beats on AI-driven data-center revenue, raises outlook and expands a multi-year AWS custom-silicon partnership; shares hit a record high

Fed cuts but signals fewer 2025 cuts; stocks tumble broadly
